_comment: Build-time mirror of (slug, title, tag) for the dynamic /api/og/blog/<slug>.svg endpoint. The endpoint is a pure Node module (vite plugin + Express server) and so cannot import the @/ runtime registry; this JSON is its source of truth. Kept in sync with client/src/lib/blog.ts and the 6 post modules under client/src/content/blog/. The vitest spec client/src/lib/blog.test.ts asserts this JSON matches the runtime registry exactly — adding, renaming, or retitling a post without updating this file fails CI.
